'''lachata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaleogram|scaleogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaleogram|scaleogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lachata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læchætæth|læchætæth]] || [[word:læchætæj|læchætæj]] || [[word:læchætæsh|læchætæsh]] || [[word:læchætæ|læchætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachachatath|lachachatath]] || [[word:lachachataj|lachachataj]] || [[word:lachachatash|lachachatash]] || [[word:lachachata|lachachata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachatath|lachatath]] || [[word:lachataj|lachataj]] || [[word:lachatash|lachatash]] || [[word:lachata|lachata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachaftath|lachaftath]] || [[word:lachaftaj|lachaftaj]] || [[word:lachaftash|lachaftash]] || [[word:lachaftaf|lachaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lachatatha|lachatatha]] || [[word:lachataja|lachataja]] || [[word:lachatasha|lachatasha]] || [[word:lachataka|lachataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lachatath|lachatath]] || [[word:lachataj|lachataj]] || [[word:lachatash|lachatash]] || [[word:lachata|lachata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lachatathal|lachatathal]] || [[word:lachatajal|lachatajal]] || [[word:lachatashal|lachatashal]] || [[word:lachatakal|lachatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lachatathatha|lachatathatha]] || [[word:lachatajaja|lachatajaja]] || [[word:lachatashasha|lachatashasha]] || [[word:lachataka|lachataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lachatathan|lachatathan]] || [[word:lachatajan|lachatajan]] || [[word:lachatashan|lachatashan]] || [[word:lachatakan|lachatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lachatathaoro|lachatathaoro]] || [[word:lachatajaoro|lachatajaoro]] || [[word:lachatashaoro|lachatashaoro]] || [[word:lachatakaoro|lachatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
